name: @openvole/paw-github
description: Paw for interacting with GitHub via the Octokit REST API

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Create a GitHub issue in a repository

tools.name: github_list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_create_pr
tools.description: Create a pull request in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_prs
tools.description: List pull requests in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_get_file
tools.description: Get file content from a GitHub repository
